title: vepris unifoliolata
intro: Vepris unifoliolata, also known as African star anise, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Vepris unifoliolata is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are prepared by steeping the leaves and bark in hot water.
